overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy depicting first-person exploration of the Hufflepuff common room. The player character moves through a dark underground wine cellar with brick arches and barrels, transitions through a round wooden tunnel door, and emerges into a bright, plant-filled circular common room decorated for Christmas, eventually ascending a spiral staircase to an upper balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground brick wine cellar with barrel storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit underground cellar with wine barrels, brick arches, and wall torches

entered.detail: arched brick ceiling with repeating barrel vault pattern
medieval-style iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling
stacked wooden wine barrels along the walls
lit torch mounted on brick wall providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, narrow underground wine cellar with brick vaulted ceilings and arches. The space is lit by wall torches and an iron chandelier, with wooden wine barrels stacked along the walls. The camera moves forward through the cobblestone corridor toward a distant archway.

events.description: approaching and entering large round wooden door with metal hinges
emerging from dark tunnel into brightly lit common room

agents.ego_description: moving through a round wooden door and proceeding through a curved wooden tunnel structure

entered.detail: large circular wooden door with metal hinges and carved details set in brick frame
curved wooden tunnel with ribbed support beams creating a cylindrical passage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive round wooden door set in the brick wall and enters a curved wooden tunnel. The lighting transitions from dim torchlight to bright natural light as the tunnel opens into the common room ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular common room with Christmas decorations and fireplace

events.description: ghostly transparent figure appears near the stone fireplace
entering side nook with stained glass dome ceiling and bookshelves

agents.ego_description: walking around the common room observing the Christmas tree, fireplace, and various seating areas while passing other students

notable_agents.action: student in wizard robes walking across the common room floor
ghostly transparent figure standing near the stone fireplace

entered.detail: tall decorated Christmas tree with ornaments and candles in the center of the room
large stone fireplace with burning fire and carved wooden mantel
tufted leather sofa with wooden frame
upper level wooden balcony with carved railings overlooking the room
numerous potted plants hanging from ceiling beams and balcony
decorative stained glass dome ceiling with floral patterns in side nook
tall wooden bookshelves filled with books in arched niches

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a bright, circular common room with high ceilings, organic wooden architecture, and abundant hanging plants. A large Christmas tree stands in the center near a stone fireplace where a ghostly figure appears. The room contains leather sofas, floor lamps, and students in robes sitting and walking about. The camera explores the space including a side nook with a stained glass ceiling and bookshelves.

events.description: beginning to ascend spiral staircase to upper level
reaching upper balcony with elevated view of the common room below

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase and walking along the upper balcony overlooking the common room from above

notable_agents.action: student standing at balcony railing looking down at the common room

entered.detail: curved wooden spiral staircase with carved railings leading upward
ornately carved wooden balcony railing overlooking the lower level
exposed curved wooden support beams of the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a spiral staircase with wooden steps and carved railings, passing wooden support beams. Upon reaching the upper balcony, the view opens to overlook the entire common room from above, with the Christmas tree now visible from a higher vantage point. A student stands at the railing looking down at the space below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, subterranean cellar into a vibrant, plant-filled common room that culminates in an elevated panoramic view. It begins by gliding through a dark underground wine cellar with brick vaulted ceilings and torch-lit corridors lined with wooden barrels. As the camera approaches a round wooden door, it passes through a curved tunnel where the dim light rapidly transitions into bright natural illumination. The scene then opens into a spacious, circular common room characterized by organic wooden architecture, hanging plants, and festive Christmas decorations, moving past students and a ghostly figure near a stone fireplace. Finally, the camera ascends a carved wooden spiral staircase to an upper balcony, overlooking the entire sunlit hall and the central tree from a high vantage point.
